response:

The task is to identify and list the original words from the given sentence: "Ẹ wo bawọn ṣọja ṣe doju ibọn kọ awọn ọdọ ni Lekki." Each sentence should start with the original word.  

Sec. 2

Sec. 3

Sec. 4

Sec. 5

Sec. 6

Sec. 7
